name: BoltGroup.ErrorStatus
summary: Define possible statuses for geometry creation/modification commands.

enum_values.name: CommonSettingFromDiffPropertiesException
enum_values.summary: Exception thrown when the common setting cannot be computed from the individual settings.

enum_values.name: SlottedHoleOffsetsTooBigException
enum_values.summary: Exception thrown when the slotted hole offsets move hole too far from bolt origin.
